# MS alarm
We encountered an issue that MS tours were not generating and MCAP task was not started.

![](data:image/png;base64,)

That task was created at 20 minutes ago, but the task not started. (Please see the screenshot at upper side)

![[Pasted image 20240815174536.png]]
![[Pasted image 20240815174528.png]]
![[Pasted image 20240815174513.png]]
And then, we inspected the root cause of it. We suspected that 3 TMs had to move for MCAP task(MS aisle #03 -> MS aisle #01), but that TMs were not moved without generating MS 

And we discovered that there was not enough space for FLEX 9 at MS aisle 01, 08 level(Please check the excel file which I attached, all space is full)

That’s why the 3 TMs had no MS tour.

So we get out other 3 TMs at MS01:08 for free space(1202405131549215004009, 1202405021933305002002, 1202405021303063004009) and then the IAT tour started and MCAP task turned allocated to started.

We request that these issues be resolved automatically without end users’ manual intervention.

Could you please check these issues and provide solutions?

Thanks.
# Inbound add vision camera and automatic wrapper
### Design & Development



1. [ ] Software Functional Specification Updates: Documentation of all new functionalities, modifications to existing UIs, error handling logic, and integration points.

2. [ ] Vision System Integration: Develop software to integrate the Vision System with the  Dematic Controls PLC using DCI TU messaging. Includes implementation of wrap required for a new Auto Wrapper location, interpretation of wrapper statuses, and error handling for communication.  

3. [ ] Automated Wrapper Integration: Software to integrate with the Automated Wrapper using  DCI TU messaging to the Dematic Controls PLC, using the already defined message format.  

4. [ ] Process Flow and Decision Logic: Updating routing logic based on inputs from the Vision System and Dematic Controls PLC. 

5. [ ] Exception Handling: Development of logic to resolve pallet issues at QA stations.

6. [ ] Database Schema Changes: Modifications to the database schema for storing pallet  wrapping status, reasons for failure, and wrapper status. 

7. [ ] Operational Logging: Implementation of logging for pallet wrapping events (successes and failures) with failure reasons.

8. [ ] UI Updates: Modify the QA UI to display pallet wrapping status and the reason for pallet failure at QA stations.

### Testing and Quality assurance

# Create script to change Prod, Sku 
1. [ ] Prod Code(6) =>  new Prod Code(7)
2. [ ] Prod description => new description
3. [ ] SKU ID(6) =>  new SKU ID(7)
4. [ ] Sku description => new description
5. [ ] production line => new production line id
6. [ ] barcode(20) => new barcode(21)
